description_long: This object is a large, robust shotgun with a distinctive yellowish, weathered metal body and a black ergonomic grip. The barrel is unusually long and boxy, featuring a rail system along the top, likely for mounting optics or accessories. The muzzle end is squared off with two large, circular openings, suggesting a double-barrel configuration. The trigger guard is prominent and rounded, enclosing a visible trigger and part of the internal mechanism. The grip appears textured for improved handling, and the overall construction suggests a heavy, durable firearm suitable for urban tactical scenarios. The finish is matte with visible wear, indicating frequent use or exposure to harsh conditions.
description: A large, boxy yellow double-barrel shotgun with a black ergonomic grip and a top rail, showing signs of wear. The design is robust and tactical, with a prominent trigger guard and squared muzzle.
description_view_0: Front view showing the squared muzzle with two large barrel openings and the top rail.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the long, boxy yellow barrel, black grip, and the full length of the top rail.
description_view_2: Rear view highlighting the back of the grip and the alignment of the barrels and rail.
description_view_3: Opposite side view displaying the same features as view 1, with the grip and trigger mechanism visible.
attribute_barrel_configuration: side-by-side double-barrel with squared muzzle and top rail
attribute_trigger_guard_design: rounded, medium-sized trigger guard with a smooth contour and no finger grooves
